item.title: Fuck cancer
item.description:
You were always more beautiful than me
You loved dirty comics and humor. Drinking wine and telling horrible jokes were like second nature to you
You loved life and fought so fucking hard for it
After the cancer spread you fought even harder
I don't know what's going to happen now without you . How will I ever begin to tell your niece about you. How will I ever stop crying. I wasn't even there to say goodbye. Bye little sister. Rest easy now and I'm so sorry
item.dc:creator: kimmycat57

item.title: If you live in M’urica, how many worst and best-case scenarios do you have ready to go?
item.description:
If you are not a descendant of Royalty or Nobility, ignoring the electoral process is a profound DISRESPECT for your ancestors who gave sweat, blood, and tears for their future descendants' RIGHT to choose - which is the freedom to make decisions about one's life and circumstances without interference from others. It is an important aspect of individual liberty. Examples of the right to choose include: Choosing a school for a child in a non-segregated system Exercising the right to privacy, such as the right to have an abortion Choosing what to do with one's body Choosing how to live one's life Choosing who represents them politically Choosing who would lead the society one belongs to
He got lucky. Inherited a great Economy, trashed it, was kicked out, made and still making a fuss, and in less than we could have imagined Bidenomics kept us up floating.
Racism, misogyny, xenophobia, homophobia, transphobia, and ableism are proven to be shir for society. Do better. Don't cut your nose to spite your face.
item.dc:creator: AmericanJoy

item.title: Ask and ye shall receive.
item.description:
Okay, to be clear, I was the one who asked. In my previous post. (Found here: https://imgur.com/gallery/2whpFtX) A few of the commenters there mentioned that, instead of complaining, I could provide the content I'm looking for. Which is fair I suppose, but seeing as how I'm not a male person I cannot create my own slutty male costume. I have therefore stepped up to the plate and stolen a few videos to share from one of my favourite cosplay content creators for all to enjoy.
Saved the best for last (imo). I did have to cut off the beginning of a couple of these videos to get them under the 1 minute time limit, but if you want to see more, here he is on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/silver__rox
item.dc:creator: MizWeirdo

item.dc:creator: TheReturnOfMadJuan

item.title: I hate bottom shelf memes
item.description:
Busy busy month so far. Our 744 hour stream for Extra-Life is complete! Now @FrothyStout and I are on our way to meet the guys from Neebs Gaming before hosting Imgur's 24 hour Extra-Life stream tomorrow.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
The Bottom Shelf Community has been gifted the honor of getting to host Imgur's 2024 Extra-Life 24 hour stream happening on November 2nd.
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax/my zombie submission for this year's #costumecontest Discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka for the memes Twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka for the streams
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: The Idiots of Imgur: A Mini Dump pt 185

item.title: Over the last year, I spent a lot of time with him. He actually listened. He just confirmed with me he is going to vote for Kamala. I'm ecstatic!

item.title: My first attempt at jumping
item.description: Two years ago I was in a car accident and acquired a brain injury. They told me I probably wouldn't walk again. This is my first attempt at jumping! #disability #inspirational #awesome
item.dc:creator: duffieldious018

item.title: How does the voice of Cow & Chicken work out?

item.title: The irony of the richest man in the world saying this
item.dc:creator: ChemistryAndPhysicsAreFun

item.title: Saturday MEME Phone Clearing Dump (#420)
item.description:
1. It do be like that
2. Me who just wanted some cake
3. Still one of the best pre-fight exchanges
4. Mugshots used to be way more descriptive...
5. Civil War II when?
6. Women be like
7. You're god damn right, lady
8. *sigh* "We're not so different, you and I
9. JUST SHUT UP, BRO
10. Escape attempt foiled again!
11
12. Shotgun yer beer they said....
13. Awwww, so romantic
14. HOLD UP BUDDY, You've been scrolling for too long so I gotta slap you with a puppy tax "Give up, Barkanin! I have the higher ground!"
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, I hope you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky game called Do Not Press The Button, and it's humor and style are kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable. I'm working on tons of fun stuff to do in it! For example: JOINING THE CHAIR REVOLUTION (yes there is a whole storyline where you help the chairs against the oppression of the evil tables! If you liked the humor in this dump, you would probably like the game. Please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you for supporting indie devs!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Arnold Schwarzenegger and politics! iwillvote.com and vote.org
item.description:
Thousands of people before us fought sweat, tears, and blood for most of us to have the RIGHT TO VOTE. Preserve and protect DEMOCRACY. GO VOTE & VOTE BLUE up and down the ballot. MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE: iwillvote.com
DO SOMETHING. DO WHAT YOU CAN. https://secure.actblue.com/donate
item.dc:creator: AmericanJoy

item.title: I was feeling pretty anxious about the election but this is giving me hope!
item.description: https://newrepublic.com/post/187767/maga-men-jesse-waters-meltdown-wives-secretly-voting-harris https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2024/nov/01/women-canceling-out-men-votes-trump-harris https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2024/11/01/women-voting-secret-choice/
item.dc:creator: Iblamemyparentstoo

item.title: This was my last post here
item.description: To all of my friends and supporters here, all the wonderful hundreds of thousands of people who have upvoted my drawings and put them on the front page more times than I can count, thank you all so much. It has been uplifting and enlightening talking with all of you. My last post, a beautiful drawing of a friend of mine was deleted by spineless censors. What used to be a fun space for oddballs to express themselves has turned into something I no longer wish to be a part of. Take care of yourselves, this community is wonderful.
item.dc:creator: derekmatters2

item.title: "This thing was built to last..."
item.description: Tesla bro out there trying to hide the fact that the windshield just caved in under his weight. :)
